lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Oh hello, are you having trouble? The cogs are in four rooms below us. Place one cog on a pole on each of the four tower levels.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, gotcha. I'll do that then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello monk.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Hello adventurer. My name is Brother Kojo. Do you happen to know the time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, sorry, I don't.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Exactly! This clock tower has recently broken down, and without it nobody can tell the correct time. I must fix it before the town people become too angry!

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: I don't suppose you could assist me in the repairs? I'll pay you for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK old monk, what can I do?

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Oh, thank you kind [sir/madam]! In the cellar below, you'll find four cogs. They're too heavy for me, but you should be able to carry them one at a time.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: I know one goes on each floor... but I can't exactly remember which goes where specifically. Oh well, I'm sure you can figure it out fairly easily.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'll do my best.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Thank you again! And remember to be careful, the cellar is full of strange beasts!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now old monk.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: OK then. Come back and let me know if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've placed a cog!

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: That's great. Come see me when you've done the other three.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Two down!

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Two to go.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: One left.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have replaced all the cogs!

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Really..? Wait, listen! Well done, well done! Yes yes yes, you've done it! You ARE clever!

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: The townsfolk will all be able to know the correct time now! Thank you so much for all of your help! And as promised, here is your reward!
